Advertising.note: Fresh run. All 5 POST + 5 PATCH cases match expected status + 400 message text "imageUrl must be a valid http(s) URL". Empty-imageUrl sanity probe preserved "imageUrl is required".
Advertising.cleanup: Created banner archived during teardown (PATCH /:bannerId/status status='archived'). No invalid URLs persisted to DB.

Smoke.note: Smoke covers login, /api/health, GET / (Vite SPA shell), /api/stores, /api/stores/:id, /api/stores/:id/advertising/banners, /api/auth/csrf. Session-rate guard well under Wave-1 regression threshold.

sideFindings: qa-admin@example.com still not seeded on staging; used admin@example.com / admin12345 per brief allowance. Recommend seeding or updating brief.

Brief listed GET /api/advertising/banners?storeId=… in Block 3 smoke; canonical route is GET /api/stores/:storeId/advertising/banners (advertising.controller.ts:31). Block 3 adapted to canonical route — brief / AGENTS.md §6.2 catalogue should be updated.
No DELETE for invites. Three valid invite rows from previous Block 1 run on 96d7d63 (wave4-valid-*, wave4-tag+*, wave4.name-*) still persist; carry as future ticket.
No /api/version endpoint; deployed-build identification still requires docker inspect. Already recommended in 96d7d63 Block 2 doc.
CSRF token rotates per /api/auth/csrf GET; helper re-fetches token immediately before each mutating request.
